docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM-JEAN MILEFF FILED BY SF AUTORETURN NIGMA, HATEM
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-29-2011 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-29-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NIGMA, HATEM $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,625.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT NIGMA, HATEM

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SF AUTORETURN
